name: Blender Bearnaise Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the shallots.
2. In a small pan, heat tarragon vinegar, tarragon leaves, shallots, and white wine until almost all liquid is absorbed.
3. Transfer the mixture to a blender and add egg yolks, salt, mustard, Bovril, and Sauce Robert.
4. Blend for 15 seconds.
5. Heat butter until sizzling hot.
6. Pour the hot butter into the running blender in a steady stream and blend until thick.
Note: If you immediately pack the bearnaise sauce into a preheated thermos, it will hold perfectly for 1 hour. This method also works for hollandaise.
